category_sources: source_facts.description says NTLM authentication proxy with tunneling; official homepage describes Cntlm as an authenticating HTTP proxy.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cntlm; official homepage uses the project name Cntlm.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides configuration hints and links to the technical manual; official PDF is the Cntlm manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Cntlm SVN page says the Subversion repository resides at http://svn.awk.cz/cntlm.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe NTLM authentication, HTTP proxy behavior, and tunneling support.
